title: Smoky Floral Thai Chicken Roast
description: A fragrant, juicy roast chicken infused with smoky spice and delicate floral notes, perfect for a romantic dinner.
instructions: Pat the chicken dry and season the cavity with salt and pepper.
In a bowl, whisk together ghee, curry paste, lime juice, tamari, honey, orchid powder, garlic, ginger, smoked paprika, and a pinch of salt.
Loosen the skin over the breast and thighs and rub a generous amount of the mixture under the skin and on all outer surfaces.
Tuck the kaffir lime leaves and a handful of Thai basil into the cavity for aroma.
Tie the legs together with kitchen twine and place the chicken breast‑side up on a roasting rack in a shallow pan.
Roast for 60 minutes, basting every 15 minutes with the remaining mixture, until the skin is deep golden and juices run clear.
Remove from oven and let rest 10 minutes before carving.
Serve with toasted jasmine rice and a drizzle of the leftover floral sauce.
